title: oreogrammitis graminifolia
intro: Oreogrammitis graminifolia, also known as the grass fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Australia and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis graminifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tea, and can also be dried and used in herbal supplements or tinctures.
